LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DONOHOE & CARROLL MEMORIALS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED BECAUSE THE OBJECTIONS TO THE SUTTER DECLARATION ARE WELL TAKEN AND BECAUSE IN ANY EVENT, HE DOES NOT OPINE THAT A 6-INCH THICK MONUMENT NEEDS DOWLES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO STRICT LIABILITY BECAUSE THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT A MONUMENT SOLD AND ERECTED BY ONE IN THE BUSINESS OF SELLING AND ERECTING MONUMENTS IS NOT A PRODUCT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Stratman, Esq. of Valerian Patterson & Stratman, 510-521-0612 for defendant and moving party Donohoe & Carroll Memorials
Todd Emanuel, Esq., 650-369-8900 for plaintiff and opposing party Ellen Joyce

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT DONOHOE & CARROLL MEMORIALS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED BECAUSE THE OBJECTIONS TO THE SUTTER DECLARATION ARE WELL TAKEN AND BECAUSE IN ANY EVENT, HE DOES NOT OPINE THAT A 6-INCH THICK MONUMENT NEEDS DOWLES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO STRICT LIABILITY BECAUSE THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT A MONUMENT SOLD AND ERECTED BY ONE IN THE BUSINESS OF SELLING AND ERECTING MONUMENTS IS NOT A PRODUCT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion To Compel On-Site Soil Inspection
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Todd P. Emanuel, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Ellen Joyce
Peter O. Glaesner, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: The Roman Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco

HEARING HELD: Plaintiff Ellen Joyce's Motion To Compel On-Site Soil Inspection. RULING AFTER HEARING: The testing shall take place on the right side of the monument. A hand augur, and no mechanical instruments shall be used. Hand probe will be used. Plaintiff will supply expert's liability policy. The testing to take place within 30 days. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
